landing.metaTitle: 100% Free Resume Builder - Open Source CV Creator
landing.metaDescription: Create your professional CV for free with our Open Source online resume builder. No payments, no subscriptions, no registration required. Totally free PDF export.
landing.heroSubtitle: The most intuitive, 100% free resume builder for modern professionals. No paywalls, no hidden fees, no registration required. Just enter your data and download a high-quality PDF.
landing.openSourceDesc: Built with the community in mind. Our code is Open Source on GitHub, ensuring total transparency and security for your professional data.
landing.noPaymentsDesc: We believe job tools should be accessible. Enjoy full access to all templates and features without subscriptions or credit cards.
landing.feature1Desc: Choose from modern, ATS-ready designs that highlight your experience and skills perfectly.
landing.feature2Desc: Download your curriculum vitae in high-resolution PDF format, ready to send and print.
landing.feature3Desc: Privacy first. Start building your CV immediately without creating an account or sharing passwords.
landing.howTitle: How to Build Your Free Resume in Minutes
landing.step1Desc: Fill in your background, skills, and summary using our intuitive, fast-loading form.
landing.step2Desc: See your changes instantly on a professional A4 template as you type.
landing.step3Desc: Get a high-quality, ATS-optimized PDF ready for your next big opportunity.
landing.seoFullTitle: Your Transparent and Free Online Curriculum Vitae Creator
landing.seoFullText: Searching for a truly free resume builder? CV Creator is an Open Source project designed to help you build a professional curriculum vitae without any paywalls. No subscription, no credit card required. Experience the freedom of a tool that respects your data and your time. Build, customize, and export your dream CV today.
landing.communityDesc: Join thousands of users who trust our open platform to launch their careers without borders.
landing.saveDesc: Your work is always safe. Create an optional free account to store your CVs in the cloud, or export your data as a JSON file to back it up locally and import it anytime — no data loss ever.
landing.savePoint1: Cloud saving with a free account
landing.savePoint2: Export your CV as a JSON backup
landing.savePoint4: Works fully offline without an account
landing.qrTitle: Add a QR Code to Your Resume
landing.qrDesc: Stand out from the crowd. CV Creator lets you embed a custom QR code directly into your resume. Link it to your LinkedIn, portfolio, GitHub, or any URL so recruiters can instantly access more about you with a single scan.
landing.qrPoint1: Link to LinkedIn, portfolio or GitHub
landing.qrPoint2: Scannable in seconds by any smartphone
landing.qrPoint3: Printed and digital CVs both benefit
landing.templatesSubtitle: 5 modern designs to stand out. Click any template to try it instantly with demo data — no registration required.
